title: Ender eye Plus
description: A datapack that makes the creation of the Eye of Ender more difficult
body:
This data pack expands the crafting recipe for the Eye of Ender, making you have to explore many more areas of the game. Here are some of the items required for this new crafting recipe

Wind Charge: This item is required for its crafting

Echo Shard: This item is required for its crafting

Blaze Rod: This item is required for its crafting

Ender Pearl: This item is required for its crafting

Prismarine Shard: This item is required for its crafting

Thus, encouraging exploration in the game
